Vehicles.VehicleBuildDef.label: Fokker Dr.I
Vehicles.VehicleBuildDef.description:
A compact triplane fighter renowned for its exceptional agility and rapid climbing ability. Though slower than many contemporary aircraft, its maneuverability made it a feared dogfighter in the hands of skilled pilots.

Being a flying vehicle, it is extremely obvious when on the move.

<color=#bb8f04>Crew:</color> Pilot x1
<color=#bb8f04>Fuel type:</color> Chemfuel
